name: Havano Leave Balance Report
report_script:
import frappe
from frappe import _

def execute(filters=None):
    columns = [
        {"fieldname": "employee", "label": "Employee", "fieldtype": "Link", "options": "havano_employee", "width": 200},
        {"fieldname": "employee_name", "label": "Employee Name", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 200},
        {"fieldname": "balance", "label": "Historical Balance", "fieldtype": "Float", "width": 150}
    ]

    data = []
    
    # Get ALL employees using a massive limit
    employees = frappe.get_all("havano_employee", fields=["name", "employee_name"], limit=1000000)
    
    to_date = filters.get("to_date")
    if not to_date:
        to_date = frappe.utils.today()
        
    for emp in employees:
        latest_entry = frappe.get_all(
            "Havano Leave Ledger Entry",
            filters={"employee": emp.name, "posting_date": ["<=", to_date]},
            fields=["balance_after_transaction"],
            order_by="posting_date desc, creation desc",
            limit=1
        )
        
        balance = latest_entry[0].balance_after_transaction if latest_entry else 0.0
        
        data.append({
            "employee": emp.name,
            "employee_name": emp.employee_name,
            "balance": balance
        })
        
    return columns, data
